---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a VibeStudio workflow, editor, format, or CLI capability.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Workflow Goal

What should a user be able to do?

## User Context

- Target engine or format:
- GUI, CLI, or both:
- Accessibility/localization considerations:
- AI-free path required: yes/no

## Proposed Shape

Describe the smallest useful vertical slice, including visible state, progress,
result, next action, and detail-on-demand surfaces.

## Validation

What fixture, sample project, CLI command, or smoke test should prove this?

## References And Credits

List any upstream tools, specs, UI patterns, borrowed algorithms, or assets that
need credits updates.
